appliedUpdates.description: Added SQLite quirks documentation: SQLite does not support Ecto's create constraint syntax, use unique indexes instead
Added LiveView form patterns documentation for indexed form inputs (params arrive as maps not lists)

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker modified mix.exs to add --max-cases 1 to precommit alias
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented - services.yaml already specifies test command with --max-cases 1
